fixes.title: Dropdown items no-wrap
fixes.description: Added whitespace-nowrap to HeaderMainSubItem link className so dropdown items never wrap to a second line

fixes.title: Right-aligned dropdown offset
fixes.description: Added md:-mr-6 alongside md:right-0 for right-aligned dropdowns, mirroring the md:-ml-6 offset used on left-aligned ones, so the dropdown edge aligns with the trigger button edge

fixes.title: Outline dashed instead of solid
fixes.description: Replaced focus-visible:outline-solid with focus-visible:outline-dashed in HeaderMainItem and HeaderMainSubItem (PHP and TSX), matching the global *:focus-visible outline-dotted style in body.css

fixes.title: Fixed header spacer div
fixes.description: Added header-main-spacer sibling div after the .header-main nav bar in HeaderMain.php and HeaderMain.tsx. In HeaderMain.js, the spacer is queried via nextElementSibling and its height is set to the header's offsetHeight when the scrolling class is first added (preventing layout shift), then reset to 0 when the scrolling class is removed.

validation.warningDetails: All warnings are in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs). The htmlStructureSync warning for HeaderMain is expected — TSX editor view intentionally differs from PHP frontend rendering.
